content: If 2025 is indeed the year of agent memory, integrating ICM's intrinsic reward for novelty will turn long-horizon agent memory from a passive storage system into an active self-curating library that prioritizes and retains unexpected, high-information experiences over routine trivial interactions. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where an agent's curiosity drives it to expand its memory with meaningful new knowledge, which in turn unlocks more novel exploration opportunities.
